name: Asparagus Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fresh asparagus spears in a small amount of boiling water for 8-10 minutes or until crisp-tender; drain.
2. Reserve 3 spears for garnish; cut the remaining asparagus into 1-inch pieces.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, beat eggs until foamy. Beat in cottage cheese, mustard, salt, and pepper; set aside.
4. Spray a 10-inch ovenproof skillet with Pam. Cook mushrooms over medium heat until just tender.
5. Stir in the asparagus pieces. Pour the egg mixture over the mushrooms and asparagus (if using fresh asparagus, arrange the 3 reserved spears on top).
6. Cook the mixture over low heat for about 5 minutes or until it bubbles slightly and begins to set around the edges.
7. Bake the frittata, uncovered, in a 400°F oven for about 10 minutes or until set.
8. Garnish each serving with tomato.
